India Women Hockey Team Face Wales With Semi Final Spot On The Line

Mar 11, 2026 • 8JJ Sports

India Women Hockey Team Face Wales With Semi Final Spot On The Line

The India women’s national field hockey team will face Wales in a crucial FIH Hockey World Cup Qualifier clash, with a place in the semi-finals hanging in the balance.
